use_cases: Select funding amounts in investment or grant applications
Choose pricing tiers in SaaS subscription flows
Pick milestone goals in fundraising platforms
Configure budget ranges in financial planning tools
Select credit limits or loan amounts in lending apps
ai_summary: An interactive funding tier selector card featuring gradient-filled progress circles with animated orbital dots and radial glow effects that track the user's selection. Built with framer-motion for smooth animations and supports customizable funding amount options. Ideal for fintech platforms, SaaS pricing selectors, or any application requiring milestone-based selection with rich visual feedback.
